# ScreenHand for Android

> Give your AI agent real hands on a real Android phone. Install one app, get a private link, and let an MCP-compatible AI agent (or you, in a browser) see the screen and tap, type, and swipe on real apps with real logins — over the internet.

ScreenHand is a remote Android control surface that speaks the Model Context Protocol. A lightweight app runs on the device (using Android's Accessibility Service), exposes a private tokenized URL, and any MCP client connects to drive the phone. Built by Clazro Technology Private Limited.

## Key Facts

- Android 9+ device. Standard Accessibility Service — no root, no PC needed after setup.
- MCP-native: connect Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP client at `https://mcp.screenhand.com/u/<token>/mcp`. 20 tools.
- Real input: genuine taps, typing, swipe, drag, pinch, rotate through the accessibility layer — not pixel guessing. A purpose-built keyboard sends true per-character input.
- On-device OCR (Google ML Kit) reads text from anything, including canvas/WebView/games. No third-party OCR cloud.
- Macros: record a flow once and replay it deterministically with no AI cost per run; export to CSV.
- Token isolation: each device sits behind its own secret link; invalid links see nothing.
- A real device over the internet on a poll loop — built for reliability and realness, NOT real-time/twitch-speed control.

## Getting started (self-register)

- Download the signed Agent APK at https://screenhand.com/download/ , install it (sideload), open it, and tap "Generate my link" — the app creates your own connect link + QR on the device. No sign-up, no email, no website-issued token.
- Point any MCP client at that link to drive the phone, or use the live browser view.

## Honest disclosure

- Screen contents (and OCR results) are relayed over the internet to whatever AI provider you connect. It is NOT local-only and NOT private from that provider. We say "token-isolated," never "private."
- Free during beta.

## Two builds

- ScreenHand Agent — full autonomous AI agent (direct APK download at https://screenhand.com/download/ ).
- ScreenHand Remote — human-driven remote control (coming to Play / Galaxy Store).

## Also: Desktop

- ScreenHand also controls macOS/Windows desktops via the OS accessibility layer with the full MCP toolset. See /desktop/. "One agent. Your phone and your computer."

## Access

Free beta, invite-based while reliability is hardened. Request a link: singhaldeoli106@gmail.com
